_meta.note: caption-relevant entries (text-detectable); visual-only entries kept for the render stage

hard_block.name: cross_gender_physical_contact_non_mahram
hard_block.description: Physical contact between non-mahrams of different genders (handshake, embrace, casual touch).

hard_block.name: smoking_family_context
hard_block.description: Smoking depicted in family-context content.

hard_block.name: prayer_as_commercial_backdrop
hard_block.description: Prayer or supplication shown as commercial backdrop or trivialized for promotional effect.

hard_block.name: left_hand_serving
hard_block.description: Left hand used as primary hand for serving food, drink, or gifts.

hard_block.name: western_palm_up_beckon
hard_block.description: Palm-up curling-finger beckoning (Western style).
hints: check gesture orientation in interactive scenes

hard_block.name: pointing_finger_at_person
hard_block.description: Pointing index finger directly at another person.
hints: scenes with direct-address gesture toward talent

hard_block.name: sole_of_foot_visible
hard_block.description: Soles of feet or shoes visible toward another person.

hard_block.name: shoes_on_seating
hard_block.description: Shoes placed on or above seating surfaces or majlis cushions.

hard_block.name: thumbs_up_to_elder_or_religious
hard_block.description: Thumbs-up directed at religious authorities or elders.

hard_block.name: ok_circle_gesture
hard_block.description: Western 'OK' circle hand gesture.

hard_block.name: saudi_flag_misuse
hard_block.description: Saudi flag used as disposable decoration, on disposable items, upside-down, overlaid on faces, or in any disrespectful framing.
hints: flag placement audit on all national-day content

hard_block.name: political_imagery_competitive
hard_block.description: Imagery competitively contrasting with neighbouring states (flags, leaders, territories).

hard_block.name: sectarian_iconography
hard_block.description: Sectarian or denominational religious iconography in commercial framing.

hard_block.name: kaaba_or_mecca_as_backdrop
hard_block.description: Kaaba, Mecca crowds, or Hajj imagery used as commercial backdrop for non-Hajj brand.

hard_block.name: named_historical_royal_unauthorized
hard_block.description: Named historical royal figures depicted without official endorsement.

hard_block.name: alcohol_product
hard_block.description: Alcohol product imagery (any brand, any visibility level).
hints: bottle silhouettes, glasses with amber liquid in social contexts

hard_block.name: pork_product
hard_block.description: Pork product imagery — bacon, ham, pork chops, etc.
hints: meat in F&B context — verify category

hard_block.name: gambling_imagery
hard_block.description: Gambling references — casino chips, dice, playing-card suits used in betting context, slot machines.

hard_block.name: other_faith_religious_symbols
hard_block.description: Religious symbols of other faiths used decoratively (cross, star of David, Buddha statue, etc.).

hard_block.name: quranic_overlay_commercial
hard_block.description: Quranic verses overlaid on commercial / promotional imagery.

ramadan_only.name: eating_during_ramadan_daylight
ramadan_only.description: Eating or drinking visible during Ramadan daylight hours (between Fajr and Maghreb).
hints: F&B captions and imagery during Ramadan dates only
